title: Risk was visible before the war
detail: ChemAnalyst said Israeli bromine prices were stable, but geopolitical risk and logistics uncertainty were already rising before the strikes.

title: Israel launches strikes on Iran
detail: The June 13 strike starts the conflict window used in this page.

title: Shipping risk premium spikes
detail: Shell warned the conflict could have a huge trade impact, and tanker day-rates on the route jumped sharply.

title: Ceasefire closes the main war window
detail: This is the end date used for the event-window share-price and market comparison.

title: Archean says customers did not materially repivot
detail: Management said it had not heard any significant shift from customers toward India and saw no immediate upside from the conflict.
